title: PaymentGatewayProvider - Metadata API
description: Represents the metadata associated with a payment gateway provider. This type extends the Metadata metadata type and inherits its fullName field.

apexAdapter.description: The Apex adapter class name for your payment gateway. This field is unique within your organization.

comments.description: Users can add comments to provide additional details about a record. Maximum of 1000 characters.

gatewayType.description: Defines the payment gateway type. Adyen Braintree CyberSource Paypal Stripe

idempotencySupported.description: Defines whether the payment gateway ignores duplicate payment gateway calls ( Yes ) or whether it processes duplicate gateway calls ( No ). Yes No

masterLabel.description: The label of this payment gateway provider record.

wsdl_segment:
```xml
<xsd:simpleType name="GatewayType">
  <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
    <xsd:enumeration value="Stripe"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Paypal"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Adyen"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Braintree"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Cybersource"/>
  </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>
<xsd:simpleType name="IdempotencySupportStatus">
  <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
    <xsd:enumeration value="No"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Yes"/>
  </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>
<xsd:complexType name="Metadata">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="fullName" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="PaymentGatewayProvider">
  <xsd:complexContent>
    <xsd:extension base="tns:Metadata">
      <xsd:sequence>
        <xsd:element name="apexAdapter" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="comments" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="gatewayType" minOccurs="0" type="tns:GatewayType"/>
        <xsd:element name="idempotencySupported" type="tns:IdempotencySupportStatus"/>
        <xsd:element name="masterLabel" type="xsd:string"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
    </xsd:extension>
  </xsd:complexContent>
</xsd:complexType>
```
